title: Robust Roasted Slovakian Chicken Skewers
description: A kid-friendly Slovakian dish featuring dried chillies, this recipe is low in calories and perfect for a weeknight dinner. The chicken is marinated in a mixture of spices and herbs, then roasted to perfection.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic powder, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken pieces onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast the chicken in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, mix together lemon juice and crushed dried chillies in a small bowl.
After the chicken has cooked for 15 minutes, brush the lemon and chilli mixture evenly over the skewers.
Remove the skewers from the oven and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
